title: Theatrical poster translations
wikitext:
[]: Theatrical poster translations             Quote Post by OZKai » Thu Nov 12, 2009 11:51 pm While the End of Evangelion poster is largely covered in the EoE poster thread, I was hoping someone could help me with the Death and Rebirth poster. Mainly the random text all around. Not so much the credits and title, as those are relatively easy to come by. ANY help at all is appreciated!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Nov 13, 2009 12:14 am Japanere text under the English title of Death and Rebirth is the same thing just translated in Japanese: shi (death) to (and) shinsei (rebirth). Not much I know, but it's interesting considering I don't believe EoE's title is translated into Japanese on those posters.

[]:             Quote Post by OZKai » Fri Nov 13, 2009 12:26 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Not much I know, but it's interesting considering I don't believe EoE's title is translated into Japanese on those posters.

[]:             Quote Post by OZKai » Sat Dec 12, 2009 2:55 am I think I have most of this figured out! Special thanks to LiLi for helping me out with the tagline! Translation (So Far) EVANGELION: DEATH AND EVANGELION: REBIRTH Neon Genesis Evangelion Movie Death and Rebirth Hearts melting together, destroy me Planning, Original Concept / GAINAX Character Design / Yoshiyuki Sadamoto (Comic: Monthly Shonen Ace series / published by Kadokawa Shoten) Mechanical Design / Ikuto Yamashita Director / MASAYUKI, Kazuya Tsurumaki Production / Tsugihiko Kadokawa, Norio Ikeguchi, Hiroyuki Yamaga, Takuma Kuramasu Spring 1997 Western Systems Roadshow Decided Animation Production/ PRODUCTION I.G GAINAX Distribution / Toei Original Story, Screenplay, Chief Director / Hideaki Anno EVA Film Works Committee © 1997 GAINAX / EVA Film Commission Illustration: Yoshiyuki Sadamoto NOT FOR SALE Original Japanese EVANGELION: DEATH AND EVANGELION: REBIRTH 新世紀エヴァンゲリオン 劇場版 シト新生 溶け合う心が、 私を、壊す。 企画・原作/ GAINAX キャラクターデザイン/ 貞本義行 (コミック:月刊少年エース連載/角川書店刊) メカニックデザイン/ 山下いくと 監督/ 摩砂雪、 鶴巻和哉 製作/ 角川歴彦、 池⼝頌夫、 山賀博之、 倉益琢眞 1997春 洋画系ロードショー 決定 制作 PRODUCTION I.G GAINAX 配給/ 東映 原作・脚本 総監督/ 庵野秀明 EVA作委員会作品 ©1997 GAINAX/EVA作委員会 イラスト:貞本義行 NOT FOR SALE

[]:             Quote Post by OZKai » Mon Dec 14, 2009 11:50 am And, since it is a theatrical poster, here's the text for The End of Evangelion: English Translated "Wouldn't it be nice if everyone would just die..." Ocean of hopelessness Fragile souls Devious smiles Morbid objects Self-distruction Cruel strangers Replacement of the opposite sex Immediate cure Spreading enfeeblement Imprisoned ego Fear of separation One-sided mistakes Fright of strangers Dangerous thoughts Denial with strangers Aversion to harmony Arrogant understanding Pity for the weak Uneasy photographs Scars from the past Blurred borders Divergence of commonsense Lonely people Question of value Fusion with desire Return to the womb Empty time Decline of yearning Needless me Beginning of fabrications Continuation of reality That's the end of the dream "Then, why are you here?" "...Do you really want to stay here?" THE END OF EVANGELION Neon Genesis Evangelion Motion Picture Air/My Purest Heart to You EVA Film Works Committee Distribution / Toei © 1997 GAINAX / EVA Film Commission NOT FOR SALE Original Japanese だから みんな、 死んでしまえば いいのに… 失望の海 脆弱な心 偽りの微笑み 病的な被写体 自我の崩壊 残酷な他人 代理の異性 刹那な癒し 蔓延する虚脱 無への願望 閉塞した自分 分離への不安 一方的な勘違い 他人の恐怖 危険な思考 他者との拒絶 同調への嫌悪 傲慢な把握 弱者への憐れみ 不愉快な写真 過去の傷跡 曖昧な境界 常識の逸脱 孤独なヒトビト 価値への疑問 情欲との融合 胎内への回帰 空しい時間 破滅への憧憬 要らないワタシ 虚構の始まり 現実の続き それは、夢の終わり では、 あなたは何故、ココにいるの？ …ココにいても、いいの？ THE END OF EVANGELION 新世紀エヴァンゲリオン劇場版　Air/まごころを、君に EVA作委員会作品 配給/東映 ©1997 GAINAX/EVA作委員会 NOT FOR SALE

[]:             Quote Post by OZKai » Mon Dec 14, 2009 9:03 pm And now, the fruits of these efforts!!! Evangelion: Death and Rebirth Translated Theatrical Poster: http://www.flickr.com/photos/ozkai/4185795463/in/set-72157622878241257/ The End of Evangelion Translated Theatrical Poster (Been done for a while): http://www.flickr.com/photos/ozkai/4099991036/in/set-72157622878241257 I know there are some creative liberties involved with the translation to fit the area used, but I did my best to keep the meanings intact. If anyone sees any problems with these, let me know!

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Tue Dec 15, 2009 1:12 am I may have to steal that Death and Rebirth poster and print it off sometime...

[]:             Quote Post by OZKai » Tue Dec 15, 2009 11:23 am schismatics wrote: I may have to steal that Death and Rebirth poster and print it off sometime...
summary:
[]: Theatrical poster translations             Quote Post by OZKai » Thu Nov 12, 2009 11:51 pm While the End of Evangelion poster is largely covered in the EoE poster thread, I was hoping someone could help me with the Death and Rebirth poster. Mainly the random text all around. Not so much the credits and title, as those are relatively easy to come by. ANY help at all is appreciated!

[]:          &n
